summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was provided or inferred; each open PR is useful, hydrated, non-security-sensitive work that should remain open for normal maintainer review. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is planned.

actions.reason: Large active feature PR with supplied proof and no duplicate/superseded evidence; keep open independently for maintainer/author flow.
Useful focused provider feature PR with no hydrated evidence of duplicate, supersession, or low-signal criteria; keep open independently.
Focused PR remains active but has a failed proof gate and waiting-on-author label; keep open independently rather than closing or escalating the whole shard.
Useful focused bug-fix PR with failed dependency guard checks; keep open independently for maintainer/check follow-up.
Small focused fix PR appears viable but this shard forbids merge/fix actions and provides no closure basis; keep open independently.
